Final version:
Leuprorelin acetate effectively induces profound hypogonadism by initially stimulating then permanently suppressing gonadotropin secretion, resulting in significant reduction of circulating testosterone—a hallmark feature of androgen deprivation therapy. This mechanism aligns precisely with clinical protocols for treating advanced prostate cancer. \boxed{{A}}
